description_long: This lamppost features a tall, rectangular, metallic pole with a weathered, slightly rusted surface, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The base is solid and blocky, providing stability for the structure. Extending from the top of the pole is an angled, articulated arm that supports a single, oval-shaped lamp head. The lamp head is modern in design, with a streamlined, aerodynamic profile and a dark, textured finish. There are no visible decorative elements or attachments, giving the lamppost a utilitarian, industrial appearance. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for urban streets, sidewalks, or parking lots.
description: A tall, weathered metal lamppost with a rectangular base and a single, modern oval lamp head on an angled arm. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height, rectangular pole, and the angled arm with the oval lamp head extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the pole and the circular underside of the lamp head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the angled arm and lamp head, with the weathered texture of the pole visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the straight alignment of the pole and the back of the lamp head, with no visible attachments.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, oval-shaped lamp head with a streamlined, aerodynamic profile and textured surface.
